title: turnera reginae
intro: Turnera reginae, also known as the Queen of the Night, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Turnera reginae include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. The herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, making it a popular natural remedy for promoting relaxation and overall well-being.
